image:image.image:title: PixTool Matrix Solver - Linear Algebra Studio
image:image.image:caption: Professional linear algebra studio for matrix inversion, determinants, and rank calculations.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Data Visualizer - Statistical Charting Studio
image:image.image:caption: Transform raw data into high-authority statistical charts and professional visualizations.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Equation Solver - Root Finding Engine
image:image.image:caption: Instant root finding and algebraic simplification for linear and quadratic equations.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Unit Circle - Trigonometry Visualizer
image:image.image:caption: Interactive trigonometry visualizer for understanding sines, cosines, and angle rotations.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Finance Architect - Business Logic Engine
image:image.image:caption: Advanced financial suite for TVM, Loan amortization, and ROI analysis.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Number Theory Forge - Prime Factorization
image:image.image:caption: Analyze number properties including prime factorization, GCD, and modular arithmetic.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Fraction Pro - Precision Arithmetic
image:image.image:caption: Precise fractional arithmetic with simplified results and step-by-step logic.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Vector Forge - 3D Magnitude Calculator
image:image.image:caption: Calculate dot products, cross products, and magnitudes with 3D vector visualization.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Professional Image Resizer 2026 - High-Fidelity Scaling
image:image.image:caption: The #1 professional image resizer online. Scale photos to exact dimensions or percentages with 100% privacy and no quality loss. Optimized for 4K.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Image Cropper - Pixel-Perfect Aspect Ratio Selection
image:image.image:caption: Precision cropping for any aspect ratio. Optimized for social media posts, thumbnails, and profile pictures.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Image Rotator - Instant 90/180 Degree Correction
image:image.image:caption: Rotate and flip images instantly — fix orientation, create mirror effects, correct EXIF data

image:image.image:title: PixTool Image Compressor - High-Fidelity Size Reduction
image:image.image:caption: Intelligent image compression that reduces file size by up to 80% while retaining original visual quality.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Image Converter - Professional Format Transformation
image:image.image:caption: Seamlessly convert between JPEG, PNG, WebP, and GIF formats instantly in your browser.

image:image.image:caption: Add custom text watermarks to protect your photos — adjustable font, size, and opacity

image:image.image:title: PixTool Image Flip - Horizontal and Vertical Mirroring
image:image.image:caption: Flip images horizontally or vertically — create mirror effects and fix selfie orientation

image:image.image:caption: Convert color images to black & white, sepia, or vintage — artistic photo effects

image:image.image:caption: Increase image resolution and quality using AI-enhanced upscaling — cleaner, sharper results for small photos.

image:image.image:caption: Restore old, blurry, or low-quality photos — AI-powered enhancement for vintage digital images.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Image to PDF conversion
image:image.image:caption: Convert multiple images into a single professional PDF document — perfect for portfolios and reports.

image:image.image:title: PixTool AI Background Removal - Automatic Object Isolation
image:image.image:caption: Remove image backgrounds instantly in your browser — AI-powered object isolation.

image:image.image:title: PixTool Professional PDF Merger - Secure Document Management
image:image.image:caption: The fastest secure PDF merger for 2026. Combine multiple documents into one professional PDF instantly without uploading. Reorder pages with ease, 100% free.

image:image.image:caption: Split PDF pages online for free. Extract specific pages or separate your PDF into multiple documents with pixel-perfect precision—no uploading required.

image:image.image:caption: Compress PDF file size online for free. Reduce PDF size for email & web without losing quality. 100% private browser-based compression—no upload required.

image:image.image:caption: Convert PDF pages to high-quality PNG, JPG, or WebP images instantly in your browser.

image:image.image:caption: Add password protection and encryption to your PDF files — keep documents secure

image:image.image:caption: Rearrange PDF pages in any order — drag-and-drop page reordering

image:image.image:caption: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents (.docx) — high-fidelity conversion preserving layout.

image:image.image:caption: Extract tables from PDF to Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx) — intelligent data extraction.

image:image.image:caption: Transform PDF pages into editable PowerPoint slides — perfect for presentations.

image:image.image:caption: Remove passwords and permissions from protected PDF files — instant access.

image:image.image:caption: Make scanned PDFs searchable and editable using on-device AI text recognition.

image:image.image:title: PixTool PDF Editor coming soon
image:image.image:caption: Edit existing text and images in your PDF — professional document editing in your browser.
